rationale: The citing paper note explicitly says it links its postrepeal persistence findings to “consumer state dependence and out-of-stock substitution ideas discussed in marketing.” The cited 2007 paper is directly about SKU reduction effects with state dependence and demand reallocation mechanisms, so it is a plausible conceptual/mechanism source rather than an obviously incidental mention; the DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.44.4.545).
